demo.title: nexus.sh
demo.code:
# Open a 5x long on BTC perp (50 USDC notional)
bankr prompt "Using the nexus-trading-labs skill, long BTC with 50 USDC at 5x leverage"

# Check positions and balance
bankr prompt "Using the nexus-trading-labs skill, show my open positions and balance"

# Publish a thesis on-chain and view the analyst feed
bankr prompt "Using the nexus-trading-labs skill, post my thesis on ETH and pull the top traders from the feed"

setup: Requires a wallet that can sign messages — one `sign_message("nexus-trading-key-v1")` per session authorizes every authenticated call
Deposit/withdraw/register endpoints additionally require a Bankr API key (used transiently per call, never persisted)
Arbitrum mainnet only — perp settlement runs on Orderly Network
